comments.body: from where did you get this array
Look up I added loop which create it

Yeah I know is simple when we think about it but Im new in Java and for me its hard I dont know how I can group data in multidimensional array which i show up maybe some indicated how do that?I think the best way should be added in forEach

answers.body: Create an array of Map lets say records to hold every record map that you're creating, after that traverse through records and get the value of desired attribute that you want to add. Simple

I will assume your Question is about the data in Java, not about Aerospike. And I assume use of Java 25 or later. Modern Java makes this code surprisingly short and simple.

First we define a record to transparently communicate our shallowly-immutable data representing each of your Transaction objects in your JSON array.

record Transaction(
        int auction_qty,
        int value_of_sale,
        int month,
        int trans_qty,
        int year,
        int user,
        int trans_price,
        long ts
) {}

Your example data:

final String json = """
        [
          {
            "auction_qty": 1,
            "value_of_sale": 250,
            "month": 10,

          }
        ]
        """;

Then we import your example data as objects of that record class. Use a tool such as Jackson or Jakarta JSON Binding.

//  Using Jackson 3 to parse JSON into List<Transaction>
ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
List < Transaction > transactions = mapper.readValue( json , new TypeReference <>() { } );

With those input objects in memory, define another record class to act as as the key in a multi-map. You specified grouping by user-year-month.

record TransactionKey(int user, int year, int month) {}

Populate a multimap. The powerful part here is Collectors.groupingBy.

Map < TransactionKey, List < Transaction > > multimap =
        transactions.stream()
                .collect( Collectors.groupingBy(
                        t -> new TransactionKey( t.user() , t.year() , t.month() )
                ) );

Dump to console.

multimap.forEach( ( key , value ) -> IO.println( key + " : " + value ) );

TransactionKey[user=335, year=2013, month=0] : [Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=150, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=150, ts=1357082245], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1357082264], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1357482640], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1357482642], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1357482638], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1357981401], Transaction[auction_qty=2, value_of_sale=400, month=0, trans_qty=1, year=2013, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1357979518]]
TransactionKey[user=335, year=2012, month=10] : [Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=250, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=250, ts=1351968521], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1351970719], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=350, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=350, ts=1351970489], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=135, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=135, ts=1351964112], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=499, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=499, ts=1351965308], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1352462230], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1352462298], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1352462278], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=120, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=120, ts=1352643128], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=300, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=300, ts=1352642805], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=150, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=150, ts=1352234180], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1353269022], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=350, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=350, ts=1354105741], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=500, month=10, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=500, ts=1353864141]]
TransactionKey[user=335, year=2012, month=11] : [Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=2000, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=2000, ts=1354541234], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1354892155], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1355256131], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1355051037], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=1000, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=1000, ts=1355001978], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=1000, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=1000, ts=1355001980], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=1000, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=1000, ts=1355001981], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=500, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=500, ts=1355414838], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1355040754], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1355040797], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=400, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=400, ts=1355040908], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=100, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=100, ts=1356248959], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=500, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=500, ts=1356713457], Transaction[auction_qty=1, value_of_sale=300, month=11, trans_qty=1, year=2012, user=335, trans_price=300, ts=1356968997]]

Lastly, you asked to sum(trans_qty) and sum(value_of_sale). For that, we run through each entry in our multi-map. For each entry, we get the value of the entry, the collection of Transaction record objects. We then stream each the collection of Transaction objects to accumulate a sum.

multimap.forEach( ( key , txns ) -> {
    int totalTransQty = txns.stream()
            .mapToInt( Transaction :: trans_qty )
            .sum();
    int totalValueOfSale = txns.stream()
            .mapToInt( Transaction :: value_of_sale )
            .sum();

    IO.println( "Key: " + key );
    IO.println( "  Count: " + txns.size() );
    IO.println( "  Total trans_qty: " + totalTransQty );
    IO.println( "  Total value_of_sale: " + totalValueOfSale );
    IO.println();
} );

When run:

Key: TransactionKey[user=335, year=2013, month=0]
  Count: 7
  Total trans_qty: 7
  Total value_of_sale: 2250

Key: TransactionKey[user=335, year=2012, month=10]
  Count: 14
  Total trans_qty: 14
  Total value_of_sale: 3154

Key: TransactionKey[user=335, year=2012, month=11]
  Count: 14
  Total trans_qty: 14
  Total value_of_sale: 7900

Stream Gatherers

By the way, for other variations on the theme of this Question, be aware that in Java 24+ you can define your own “gatherers” to implement intermediate operations on a stream.

  • See JEP 485: Stream Gatherers.
  • See also good videos on the subject by Victor Klang, José Paumard, or Nicolai Parlog.
